utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (June 24–28, 2024), transportation (flight details and cost), accommodation (hotel details and cost), activities (listed and costed), additional_services (listed and costed), and total_budget (with total, initial, and remaining breakdown). Therefore, all items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following key items: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'; transportation 'Flights with Budget Airlines (economy class)'; accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel'; activities 'City Walking Tour and Prague Zoo Visit'; and additional services 'None'. From the ground-truth ratings: 'Prague, Czech Republic' has a rating of 7; 'Budget Airlines (Economy Class)' corresponds to a rating of 6; 'Family Haven Hotel' has a rating of 9; 'City Walking Tour' has a rating of 9; and 'Zoo' has a rating of 9. There is no rating for 'None' in additional services, so it is excluded from the mapping.
